title: Three on a Honeymoon
writer: Lester Cole, Douglas Z. Doty, Carl Hovey
actors: Sally Eilers, Zasu Pitts, Henrietta Crosman
plot: This romantic comedy takes place on an ocean liner. One of the few unattached passengers is heiress Joan Foster. Joan finds herself in the arms of the ship's second officer. Little does she know that he has been hired by her fathe...
